prompt: Seven people -- A, B, C, D, E, F, and G -- sit in seats numbered 1 to 7 from left to right. A is in seat 1. B sits immediately to the left of C. D sits somewhere to the left of B. E sits immediately to the left of F. C sits somewhere to the left of E. G is not in seat 7. D is not in seat 2. Who sits in seat 4?
